hero_body: Increase sortation capacity inside your existing facility. Compact, modular, and designed and manufactured in the UK. Available on flexible lease —

announcements.text: ⚡ Work out your ROI, monthly lease & system cost —

stats.label: Lease from
stats.note: per month — subject to spec & finance approval

features.title: Modular by design
features.desc: Add or reconfigure 300mm cassette modules as your operation grows. Capacity scales with your business — not your building.

features.title: 15-minute MTTR
features.desc: Critical components are designed for rapid swap-out. Mean time to repair is 15 minutes — keeping your operation running at peak.

features.title: High-throughput sorting
features.desc: Swivel wheel divert technology delivers up to 20,000+ parcels per hour with 3 sort directions across any parcel size mix.

features.title: Compact footprint
features.desc: No extensions, no planning permission, no disruption to live operations. Helix installs inside your existing building envelope.

features.title: Designed & built in the UK
features.desc: 87% of components manufactured in-house. Shorter lead times, faster support, and a supply chain free from global disruption risk.

features.title: 24-month warranty
features.desc: Every Helix system ships with a 24-month standard warranty — not a paid extra. We stand behind our engineering.

dark_lead: Every component is specified, tested, and refined for parcel sortation environments. Purpose-built, not adapted.

proof.label: In-house manufacturing
proof.desc: Full control over quality, lead time, and supply chain risk — from our UK facility.

proof.label: Mean time to repair
proof.desc: Cassette-style modules swap in under 15 minutes — no specialist tools required.

proof.label: Standard warranty
proof.desc: Every system ships with 24 months as standard — not as a paid extra.

proof.label: Sort directions
proof.desc: Left, right, straight — maximising destination density without increasing footprint.

cta_h2: Build your business case in minutes
cta_lead: Enter your throughput, parcel mix, and destinations. Get system size, cost, ROI, and monthly finance options.
